reviews.comment:
Bueno como todos los ACA

(Translated by Google)
Well, like all the ACAs
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNbUlxODF3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente estación de servicio, la comida y la cafetería excelente las hamburguesas gigantes y las porciones de papas superlativas, la limpieza de los baños es excelente, si sos socio del ACA te hacen 10% descuento, parada ideal para tu viaje en ruta lo único que le faltaría es sombra para los estacionamientos por lo demás es un 10, muy recomendable

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service station, the food and cafeteria are excellent, the hamburgers are huge and the portions of fries are superb, the restrooms are spotless, and if you're an ACA member you get a 10% discount. It's an ideal stop for your road trip; the only thing missing is shade in the parking areas, but otherwise it's a 10/10, highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNeVB1RWxRRRAB
